sql.query: SELECT c.id,c.contactCategoryId,COALESCE(cc.categoryName,c.contactType) AS contactType,c.organisationName,c.firstName,c.lastName,c.displayName,COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(CONCAT_WS(' ',c.firstName,c.lastName)),''),NULLIF(c.displayName,''),NULLIF(c.organisationName,''),'Unnamed contact') AS contactName,c.email,c.phone,c.city,c.country,c.isActive,c.createdDate,c.modifiedDate FROM tbl_contacts c LEFT JOIN tbl_contact_categories cc ON cc.contactCategoryId=c.contactCategoryId AND cc.tenantId=c.tenantId WHERE c.tenantId=:tenantId ORDER BY contactName,c.organisationName
